extName.description: Extension name shown in Chrome's extension list and toolbar.

extDescription.message: Meinungsstarkes Linting und Formatieren für Qlik-Skript.
extDescription.description: Extension description shown in Chrome's extension list.

actionTitle.description: Tooltip shown when hovering the toolbar icon.

statusLoading.description: Status label shown while the popup is still determining the current phase.

statusActive.description: Status label shown when qlint is active on the current page.

statusNeedsPermission.description: Status label shown when the user has not granted access to the current origin.

statusNotApplicable.description: Status label shown when the current page is either not http(s) or is a granted page without a Qlik script editor.

statusErrored.message: Status: Es ist ein Fehler aufgetreten
statusErrored.description: Status label shown when an error occurred during loading the extension.

grantButton.description: Button that triggers a permission request for the current origin.

fixAllButton.description: Button that triggers a fix-all pass over the current Qlik script.

settingsButton.description: Accessible label and tooltip for the gear icon button that opens the options page.

optionsSubtitle.message: Konfiguriere, wie qlint Qlik-Skripte in diesem Browser lintet und formatiert.
optionsSubtitle.description: Subtitle below the options page heading.

optionsPresetsLabel.description: Label of the preset list section on the options page.

optionsPresetsHelp.message: Füge ein oder mehrere Presets als Basis hinzu. Die Regeln unten überschreiben sie. Ohne Preset laufen nur die Regeln, die du selbst setzt.
optionsPresetsHelp.description: Help text shown above the preset list on the options page.

optionsPresetAddButton.description: Label of the button that adds the selected preset to the list.

optionsPresetRemove.description: Accessible label of the button that removes a preset from the list.

optionsRulesLabel.description: Label of the per-rule severity section on the options page.

optionsRulesHelp.message: Lege pro Regel den Schweregrad fest. „default“ folgt den gewählten Presets – ohne Preset ist die Regel aus.
optionsRulesHelp.description: Help text shown above the per-rule severity list on the options page.

optionsConfigLabel.description: Label of the raw JSON editor section on the options page.

optionsConfigHelp.message: Konfiguration direkt editieren. Für Regel-Optionen, die in der Liste oben nicht angeboten werden.
optionsConfigHelp.description: Help text shown above the JSON editor on the options page.

optionsSaveButton.description: Label of the save button on the options page.

optionsResetButton.description: Label of the reset button on the options page that clears all presets and rule overrides.

optionsConfigSaved.description: Confirmation shown after a successful save on the options page.

optionsResetConfirm.message: Alle Einstellungen zurücksetzen? Das entfernt alle Presets und Regel-Overrides.
optionsResetConfirm.description: Confirmation prompt shown before resetting the configuration on the options page.
